title: Cesium Chloride Protocol for Phage
description:
{"blocks":[{"key":"bq2gb","text":"This protocol contains 4 sections: 
1. Cesium Chloride Gradient to separate phage from bacteria. Marine viruses around 1.5g/ml
2. DNase I treatment of CsCl-purified phage
3. Formamide Extraction of DNA from phagE4. 
4. CTAB","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
